subject: The exterior of an Azorius civic building — grand neoclassical architecture with domed roofs and a triangular pediment bearing geometric emblems
description: A wide establishing view of a monumental civic building seen from a low-angle vantage. The structure features multiple domed rooftops of deep blue, colonnaded facades, and a prominent central triangular pediment decorated with blue and gold geometric panels. Lamposts with blue-glass globes line the approach. The stonework is pale gold and cream. Mist or fog softens the background. The composition is purely architectural — no figures are present. The building reads as a courthouse or administrative hall: austere, imposing, symmetrical.
foreground: colonnaded facade with lamposts and blue-domed rooftops
background: further domed structures receding into mist
emotion: cold authority, institutional weight, civic power
